text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iran, Pakistan Foreign Ministers Discuss Ceasefire in Phone Call Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi and Pakistani Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Mohammad Ishaq Dar spoke by phone Sunday, discussing regional developments and ceasefire-related issues. Dar outlined Pakistan's efforts to end the war and restore regional peace, reaffirming Islamabad's readiness to continue consultations. Araghchi thanked Pakistan for its mediation efforts, while stressing Iran's responsible approach to diplomatic engagement. He pointed to what he described as repeated US bad faith — including US military strikes on Iran during active negotiations in May and March 2025 — as well as recent ceasefire violations, threats against Iranian ports, coastlines and vessels, threatening rhetoric, unreasonable demands, and persistent contradictions as clear evidence that Washington is not serious about diplomacy. Araghchi stated that Iran will use all available means to protect its national interests and security. Both ministers agreed to continue consultations toward their shared goal of preserving regional peace and stability. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗、巴基斯坦外交部长通话讨论停火事宜。伊朗外交部长赛义德·阿巴斯·阿拉格希与巴基斯坦副总理兼外交部长穆罕默德·伊沙克·达尔周日通电话，讨论了地区局势和与停火相关的问题。达尔概述了巴基斯坦为结束战争和恢复地区和平所做的努力，并重申伊斯兰堡愿意继续进行磋商。阿拉格希感谢巴基斯坦的调解努力，同时强调了伊朗在外交接触中负责任的态度。他指出，美国多次表现出不诚实——包括2025年5月和3月在积极谈判期间对伊朗进行的军事打击——以及最近违反停火协议、威胁伊朗港口、海岸线和船只、威胁性言论、无理要求和持续的矛盾，这些都是华盛顿在外交上不严肃的明确证据。阿拉格希表示，伊朗将利用一切可用手段保护其国家利益和安全。两位部长同意继续就维护地区和平与稳定的共同目标进行磋商。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Disclose.tv NEW - CENTCOM releases footage of the U.S. forces intercepting M/V Touska and says that "since the blockade’s commencement, U.S. forces have directed 25 commercial vessels to turn around or return to an Iranian port." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045976380379222379/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 美国中央司令部发布了美军拦截“Touska”号货轮的视频，并称“自封锁开始以来，美军已引导25艘商船掉头或返回伊朗港口。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045976380379222379/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender The Israel Defense Force has confirmed the authenticity of a photo showing an Israeli Soldier smashing a statue of Jesus Christ in Southern Lebanon, adding that “appropriate measures will be taken against those involved” under the IDF Northern Command. Photo currently circulating on social media which appears to show a soldier with the Israel Defense Force striking and destroying a statue of Jesus Christ on the cross using a sledgehammer during recent operations in the Christian town of Debel in Southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045951769692213729/photo/1 - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 以色列国防军已证实一张照片的真实性，照片显示一名以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部砸毁了一尊耶稣基督雕像，并补充说，根据以色列国防军北方司令部的规定，“将对相关人员采取适当措施”。目前在社交媒体上流传的照片显示，在最近黎巴嫩南部基督教城镇德贝尔（Debel）的行动中，一名以色列国防军士兵使用大锤击打并摧毁了一尊十字架上的耶稣基督雕像。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045951769692213729/photo/1 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: Open Source Intel 2 U.S. officials and 2 Mexican officials were killed in a car crash in the northern Mexican state of Chihuahua while supporting local efforts to combat cartel operations, the U.S. embassy and state authorities said. BREAKING 🔴 Embassy: 2 U.S. officials killed in a car crash in Mexico while assisting anti cartel operations - Reuters - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国大使馆和州政府表示，2名美国官员和2名墨西哥官员在墨西哥北部奇瓦瓦州的一场车祸中丧生，当时他们正在支持当地打击贩毒集团的行动。突发 🔴 大使馆：2名美国官员在墨西哥协助打击贩毒集团行动时死于车祸 - 路透社 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: WarMonitor Zelensky says Ukraine has signed 10-year defense deals with Saudi Arabia, the UAE, and Qatar, with interest from 11 countries, as part of a broader push to expand drone production, including new manufacturing and joint tech development across Europe and the Middle East. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045974468284055845/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 泽连斯基表示，乌克兰已与沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋和卡塔尔签署了为期10年的防务协议，并有11个国家表示有兴趣，这是扩大无人机生产更广泛推动的一部分，包括在欧洲和中东进行新的制造和联合技术开发。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045974468284055845/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Footage of the destroyer USS Spruance firing its main gun at the Iranian-flagged cargo vessel Touska as it attempted to run the US blockade today. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045974375074083220/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 驱逐舰“斯普鲁恩斯”号（USS Spruance）向试图突破美国封锁的伊朗籍货轮“Touska”号发射主炮的视频。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045974375074083220/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 BREAKING | According Iranian press tv, During a phone conversation with his Pakistani counterpart, Iran FM Abbas Araghchi 👉 Recalled America's repeated breaches of faith over the past year. 👉 Cited US military aggression against Iran during negotiations in June and March 2025. 👉 Noted recent US violations of the ceasefire, threats to Iranian ports/coasts/vessels, threatening rhetoric, unreasonable demands, and contradictions. 👉 Stated these are clear signs of US ill intentions and lack of seriousness in diplomacy. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 突发 | 据伊朗新闻电视台报道，在与巴基斯坦外长通话时，伊朗外长阿巴斯·阿拉格希 👉 回顾了美国过去一年多次违背承诺的行为。 👉 提到了美国在2025年6月和3月谈判期间对伊朗的军事侵略。 👉 指出了美国近期违反停火协议、威胁伊朗港口/海岸/船只、威胁性言论、无理要求和矛盾行为。 👉 表示这些是美国恶意和在外交上缺乏诚意的明确迹象。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF: A preliminary review of a photo showing a soldier damaging a Christian symbol confirms it was taken in southern Lebanon. The IDF says the conduct is taken seriously and does not reflect the standards expected of its troops. The Northern Command is investigating, and the case is being handled through the chain of command. Action will follow based on the findings. The military is also working with the local community to restore the statue. The IDF states its mission in southern Lebanon is to dismantle Hezbollah infrastructure and that it does not target civilian or religious sites. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军：对一张显示士兵损坏基督教符号的照片进行的初步审查证实，该照片是在黎巴嫩南部拍摄的。以色列国防军表示，这种行为被严肃对待，并不反映对其部队所期望的标准。北方司令部正在进行调查，案件正通过指挥链处理。将根据调查结果采取行动。军方也正在与当地社区合作修复雕像。以色列国防军声明其在黎巴嫩南部的任务是拆除真主党基础设施，并不针对平民或宗教场所。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Central Command: Guided-missile destroyer USS Spruance (DDG 111) intercepted M/V Touska as it transited the north Arabian Sea at 17 knots enroute to Bandar Abbas, Iran. American forces issued multiple warnings and informed the Iranian-flagged vessel it was in violation of the U.S. blockade. After Touska’s crew failed to comply with repeated warnings over a six-hour period, Spruance directed the vessel to evacuate its engine room. Spruance disabled Touska’s propulsion by firing several rounds from the destroyer’s 5-inch MK 45 Gun into Touska’s engine room. U.S. Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit later boarded the non-compliant vessel, which remains in U.S. custody. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部：导弹驱逐舰“斯普鲁恩斯”号（DDG 111）在“Touska”号货轮以17节航速驶往伊朗阿巴斯港途中，在北阿拉伯海对其进行了拦截。美军发出了多次警告，并告知这艘伊朗籍船只违反了美国的封锁。在“Touska”号船员在六小时内未遵守多次警告后，“斯普鲁恩斯”号指示该船撤离机舱。“斯普鲁恩斯”号通过从驱逐舰的5英寸MK 45舰炮发射多发炮弹击中“Touska”号机舱，使其失去了动力。来自第31海军陆战队远征部队的美国海军陆战队员随后登上了这艘不合规的船只，该船目前仍在美国的控制之下。推文

text: Open Source Intel MUST WATCH 🔴 CENTCOM: On April 19, U.S. forces in the Arabian Sea enforced the blockade by intercepting the Iranian flagged M V Touska heading to Bandar Abbas at 17 knots. USS Spruance (DDG-111) issued repeated warnings over 6 hours. After non compliance, the crew was ordered to clear the engine room, which was then disabled by 5 inch MK 45 fire. Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit boarded the vessel. It is now in U.S. custody. CENTCOM says the action was deliberate and proportional. 25 vessels have been turned back since the blockade began. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 必看 🔴 中央司令部：4月19日，阿拉伯海的美军通过拦截以17节航速驶往阿巴斯港的伊朗籍“Touska”号货轮执行了封锁。“斯普鲁恩斯”号（DDG-111）在6小时内发出了多次警告。在不合规后，船员被命令清理机舱，随后机舱被5英寸MK 45炮火摧毁。来自第31海军陆战队远征部队的海军陆战队员登上了该船。目前该船处于美国控制之下。中央司令部称此行动是蓄意且适度的。自封锁开始以来，已有25艘船只被遣返。推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) has released video of the interdiction of the motor vessel Touska in the Northern Arabian Sea by the U.S. Navy Arleigh Burke-class guided missile destroyer USS Spruance (DDG-111). The video contains audio of the USS Spruance giving warnings to the Touska to vacate the engine room before firing the Mark 45 5" deck gun 3 times at the vessel. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）发布了美国海军阿利·伯克级导弹驱逐舰“斯普鲁恩斯”号（DDG-111）在北阿拉伯海拦截“Touska”号货轮的视频。视频中包含“斯普鲁恩斯”号在向该船发射3发5英寸MK 45舰炮炮弹前，警告“Touska”号撤离机舱的音频。推文

text: The Spectator Index US military says it intercepted an Iranian-flagged cargo ship that was attempting to 'sail toward an Iranian port', when it failed to comply, several rounds were fired into its engine room, disabling its propulsion and Marines 'later boarded the non-compliant vessel, which remains in U.S. custody'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 美国军方称，其拦截了一艘试图“驶向伊朗港口”的伊朗籍货轮，当该船未遵守指令时，美军向其机舱发射了多发炮弹，使其失去动力，海军陆战队“随后登上了这艘不合规的船只，该船目前仍在美国的控制之下”。推文

text: WarMonitor Iranian state media says Tehran has rejected another round of talks with the U.S. in Pakistan, citing Washington’s “excessive demands” and the ongoing naval blockade. (WaPo) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045970697286279221/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 伊朗官方媒体称，德黑兰拒绝了在巴基斯坦与美国进行新一轮会谈，理由是华盛顿的“过分要求”和持续的海上封锁。（华盛顿邮报） https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045970697286279221/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM says the destroyer USS Spruance knocked out Touska’s propulsion by striking its engine room with multiple 5 inch MK 45 gun rounds BREAKING: 🔴 U.S. President Donald Trump: "Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and gave them fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to listen, so our Navy ship stopped them right in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engineroom. Right now, U.S. Marines have custody of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury Sanctions because of their prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what’s on board!" - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 中央司令部称，驱逐舰“斯普鲁恩斯”号通过多发5英寸MK 45舰炮炮弹击中机舱，摧毁了“Touska”号的动力。突发：🔴 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“今天，一艘名为TOUSKA的伊朗籍货轮，长近900英尺，重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰，试图突破我们的海上封锁，但结果并不好。美国海军导弹驱逐舰“斯普鲁恩斯”号（USS SPRUANCE）在阿曼湾拦截了TOUSKA号，并给予了明确的停止警告。伊朗船员拒绝听从，所以我们的海军舰艇通过在机舱炸开一个洞，当场阻止了他们。目前，美国海军陆战队已控制了该船。由于其之前的非法活动历史，TOUSKA号受到美国财政部的制裁。我们已完全控制了这艘船，正在查看船上有什么！” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "📸 Israeli soldier smashing a Jesus statue’s head in southern Lebanon." IDF: The photograph depicts an IDF soldier operating in southern Lebanon. Appropriate measures will be taken.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“📸 以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部砸毁耶稣雕像的头部。” 以色列国防军：照片显示一名以色列国防军士兵在黎巴嫩南部行动。将采取适当措施。

text: CENTCOM has released video showing the destroyer USS Spruance firing its main gun at the Iranian-flagged cargo vessel Touska as it attempted to breach the U.S. blockade.
text_zh: 中央司令部发布了视频，显示驱逐舰“斯普鲁恩斯”号向试图突破美国封锁的伊朗籍货轮“Touska”号发射主炮。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 Video of the USS Spruance firing its 127mm Mk 45 naval gun at the engine room of Iranian merchant vessel M/V Touska after the ship attempted to breach a US-imposed naval blockade in the Gulf of Oman. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 “斯普鲁恩斯”号驱逐舰在伊朗商船“Touska”号试图突破美国在阿曼湾实施的海上封锁后，向其机舱发射127毫米Mk 45舰炮的视频。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Footage documents an Israeli soldier smashes the head of a statue of Jesus Christ in southern Lebanon. The statue belongs to the town of Debel in the Bint Jbeil region. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The IDF confirmed that a photograph showing a soldier damaging a Christian symbol was taken in southern Lebanon. The military said it views the incident with seriousness, stressing that the conduct does not align with the values expected of its personnel and an investigation has been launched by the Northern Command. The IDF also said it is working to assist in restoring the damaged statue and reiterated that its operations are aimed at Hezbollah infrastructure, not civilian or religious sites. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 视频记录了一名以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部砸毁一座耶稣基督雕像的头部。该雕像属于宾特朱拜勒地区的德贝尔镇。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军证实，一张显示一名士兵破坏基督教象征的照片是在黎巴嫩南部拍摄的。军方表示，它严肃对待这一事件，强调这种行为不符合对其人员所期望的价值观，北方司令部已展开调查。以色列国防军还表示，正在努力协助修复受损的雕像，并重申其行动针对的是真主党的设施，而非平民或宗教场所。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says a U.S. Navy destroyer intercepted an Iranian-flagged cargo ship: Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CENTCOM reports the USS Spruance intercepted the M/V Touska, as it transited the northern Arabian Sea in a deliberate and proportional manner. After issuing multiple warnings over a six-hour period, U.S. forces reported the vessel failed to comply. The destroyer then disabled its propulsion by firing on the engine room, after directing the crew to evacuate. U.S. Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit subsequently boarded the vessel, which remains under U.S. control. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普称一艘美国海军驱逐舰拦截了一艘伊朗籍货船：今天，一艘名为TOUSKA的伊朗籍货船，长近900英尺，重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰，试图突破我们的海军封锁……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部报告称，斯普鲁恩斯号驱逐舰（USS Spruance）在阿拉伯海北部航行时，以审慎且适度的方式拦截了“图斯卡”号（M/V Touska）货船。在六小时内发出多次警告后，美军报告称该船只未予理会。随后，驱逐舰在引导船员撤离后，通过向机舱开火使其动力系统瘫痪。来自第31海军陆战队远征部队的美国海军陆战队员随后登上了该船，目前该船仍处于美方控制之下。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 Two U.S. Embassy staff members and two Mexican security officials, including the director of the Chihuahua State Investigation Agency, were killed in a car accident while supporting joint security operations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 两名美国大使馆工作人员和两名墨西哥安全官员（包括奇瓦瓦州调查局局长）在支持联合安全行动时因车祸丧生。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: UAE Central Bank Governor Khaled Mohamed Balama raised the idea of a potential financial backstop should the conflict with Iran plung into a deeper crisis in meetings with U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessent. Emirati officials stressed the proposal is precautionary, but warned that prolonged disruption to energy infrastructure and oil shipping routes through the Strait of Hormuz could strain foreign reserves and investor confidence. They also indicated that in a worst-case scenario, the UAE could shift toward using alternative currencies such as the yuan for oil transactions, posing a potential challenge to the dominance of the U.S. dollar in global energy markets. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：阿联酋央行行长哈立德·穆罕默德·巴拉马在与美国财政部长贝森特的会晤中提出了一个想法，即如果与伊朗的冲突陷入更深层的危机，可能需要金融后盾。阿联酋官员强调该提议是预防性的，但警告称，霍尔木兹海峡的能源基础设施和石油运输路线如果长期中断，可能会使外汇储备和投资者信心承压。他们还表示，在最坏的情况下，阿联酋可能会转向使用人民币等替代货币进行石油交易，这对美元在全球能源市场的主导地位构成了潜在挑战。 @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender Unusual activity by U.S. Strategic Command (STRATCOM) continues Sunday, with a E-6B “Mercury” Communications Relay and Strategic Airborne Command Post Aircraft currently operating and transmitting off the East Coast of the United States. EAM broadcasts from the HFGCS ground stations and from the Mercury E6Bs are now happening at the same time and overlapping with each other. https://twitter.com/neetintel/status/2045950569546650000/video/1 - NEET INTEL tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国战略司令部（STRATCOM）周日继续出现异常活动，一架 E-6B“水星”通信中继和战略机载指挥所飞机目前正在美国东海岸附近运行并进行传输。来自 HFGCS 地面站和“水星”E6B 的 EAM 广播现在同时发生并相互重叠。 https://twitter.com/neetintel/status/2045950569546650000/video/1 - NEET INTEL 推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. Forces Disable Vessel Attempting to Enter Iranian Port, Violate Blockade tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 美国军队阻止了一艘试图进入伊朗港口的船只，违反了封锁令 推文

text: Open Source Intel The gunman who killed 8 children and injured 2 others in Shreveport, Louisiana, has been identified as Shamar Elkins, KTBS reports. Officials say he was related to some of the victims and was shot and killed by police during a vehicle chase in Bossier Parish. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045969234195325391/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据 KTBS 报道，在路易斯安那州什里夫波特杀害 8 名儿童并造成另外 2 人受伤的枪手已被确认为沙马尔·埃尔金斯（Shamar Elkins）。官员称，他与部分受害者有亲属关系，并在博西尔教区的一场车辆追逐中被警方击毙。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045969234195325391/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 Embassy: 2 U.S. officials killed in a car crash in Mexico while assisting anti cartel operations - Reuters tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 快讯 🔴 大使馆：2 名美国官员在墨西哥协助反卡特尔行动时因车祸丧生 - 路透社 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @neetintel : EAM broadcasts from the HFGCS ground stations and from the Mercury E6Bs are now happening at the same time and overlapping with each other. https://twitter.com/neetintel/status/2045950569546650000/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @neetintel ：来自 HFGCS 地面站和“水星”E6B 的 EAM 广播现在同时发生并相互重叠。 https://twitter.com/neetintel/status/2045950569546650000/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor UAE political analyst Abdulkhaleq Abdulla says U.S. bases have become a liability and a potential magnet for attacks rather than a strategic asset. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045968420957561208/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 阿联酋政治分析家阿卜杜勒哈利克·阿卜杜拉表示，美国基地已成为一种负担，是潜在的攻击目标，而非战略资产。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045968420957561208/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel No tankers have been able to cross the Strait of Hormuz today. - CNN tweet

text: The Spectator Index No tankers have been able to cross the Strait of Hormuz today, according to CNN. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据 CNN 报道，今天没有任何油轮能够通过霍尔木兹海峡。 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump says US military struck an Iranian cargo ship that refused to adhere to instructions. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2045966958974390416/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普称美军打击了一艘拒绝遵守指令的伊朗货船。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2045966958974390416/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor The UAE has begun early discussions with the U.S. on securing emergency dollar access if the Iran conflict escalates further, including a potential currency swap line with Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent. (WSJ) tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 阿联酋已开始与美国进行初步讨论，以确保在伊朗冲突进一步升级时获得紧急美元支持，包括与财政部长斯科特·贝森特建立潜在的货币互换额度。（《华尔街日报》） 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 BREAKING | According Iranian sources, this incident is considered a violation of the ceasefire agreement and officials are currently holding a meeting to determine the way of which they should respond to this. Many high officials are involved in this meeting. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 快讯 | 据伊朗消息人士称，此事件被视为违反停火协议，官员们目前正在开会确定应对方式。许多高级官员参与了此次会议。查看我们的最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW: IDF troops in Lebanon eliminated an armed Hezbollah operative who breached the ceasefire by crossing the Forward Defense Line and advancing toward them. I lost count on how may Hezbollah members have been eliminated since the “ceasefire” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 现在：以色列国防军在黎巴嫩消灭了一名武装真主党成员，该成员越过前沿防御线并向他们推进，违反了停火协议。我已经数不清自“停火”以来有多少真主党成员被消灭了 推文

text: Open Source Intel The Chinese-owned LPG tanker ‘G SUMMER’ is a sanctioned ship. Let’s see what happens as it approaches the U.S. Navy and Marine corps “checkpoint” The MEDA has turned back and is now holding off the coast of the UAE. Meanwhile, G SUMMER transited the Strait of Hormuz via an approved Iranian route and continues toward the U.S. blockade. https://twitter.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2045962889027371073/photo/1 - Faytuks Network tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 中国拥有的液化石油气（LPG）油轮“G SUMMER”号是一艘受制裁的船只。让我们看看当它接近美国海军和海军陆战队的“检查站”时会发生什么。MEDA 号已经掉头，目前停在阿联酋海岸外。与此同时，“G SUMMER”号通过伊朗批准的路线穿过了霍尔木兹海峡，并继续向美国封锁区航行。 https://twitter.com/FaytuksNetwork/status/2045962889027371073/photo/1 - Faytuks Network 推文

text: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 The Iranian press release of the phone call between Iranian President Pezeshkian and Pakistani Prime Minister Sharif reports that Pezeshkian informed Sharif that Iran will defend Iran against any renewed U.S. adventurism. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬与巴基斯坦总理谢里夫通话的伊朗新闻稿称，佩泽希齐扬告知谢里夫，伊朗将捍卫自身，抵御任何新的美国冒险主义。 推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW: According to IRNA, claims of a second round of talks in Islamabad are inaccurate. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 现在：据伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）报道，关于在伊斯兰堡进行第二轮会谈的说法是不准确的。 推文

text: Open Source Intel I have a feeling tomorrow is going to be a big news day. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 我有一种预感，明天将是重大新闻日。 推文

text: OSINTdefender No tankers have crossed the Strait of Hormuz so far today, according to tracking data via MarineTraffic obtained by CNN, with this following yesterday’s announcement once again closing the vital waterway by Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC). https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045963981269950972/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据 CNN 获取的 MarineTraffic 追踪数据显示，今天到目前为止还没有油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡，此前伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）再次宣布关闭这一重要水道。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045963981269950972/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Military advisers kept the president out of the command room during a Iran rescue mission, limiting briefings over concerns his behavior could jeopardize the operation, which nearly fell apart before the airman was recovered. (WSJ) tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 在一次伊朗救援任务中，军事顾问将总统排除在指挥室之外，限制了简报，因为担心他的行为可能危及行动，该行动在飞行员获救前几乎失败。（《华尔街日报》） 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 NNA: The Qasmiyeh sea bridge will be closed on Monday starting at 9:00 AM to search for the bodies of two people who were killed while passing in their car during the Israeli airstrikes that destroyed the bridge. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 国家通讯社（NNA）：卡斯米耶（Qasmiyeh）海桥将于周一上午 9:00 起关闭，以搜寻两名在以色列空袭摧毁该桥时驾车经过而丧生的人的遗体。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸Eight children were killed in a domestic shooting incident in Shreveport, Louisiana, this Sunday morning. Authorities believe that some the victims were relatives of the shooter, who is now confirmed dead. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 A gunman who killed 8 children and injured 2 others in Shreveport, Louisiana has been identified as Shamar Elkins. Authorities said the suspect was shot dead by police during a vehicle chase in Bossier Parish. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸周日早上，路易斯安那州什里夫波特发生一起家庭枪击事件，造成八名儿童死亡。当局认为，部分受害者是枪手的亲属，枪手现已确认死亡。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 在路易斯安那州什里夫波特杀害 8 名儿童并造成另外 2 人受伤的枪手已被确认为沙马尔·埃尔金斯。当局称，嫌疑人在博西尔教区的一场车辆追逐中被警方击毙。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Footage showcases funeral procession of Hezbollah fighters in southern Lebanon earlier today. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 视频展示了今天早些时候在黎巴嫩南部举行的真主党武装人员葬礼游行。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷Pakistani Prime Minister Sharif held a call with Iranian President Pezeshkian to discuss the unfolding regional situation and negotiations with the U.S. He thanked Iran for their continued engagement in negotiations and for sending a negotiation team…" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 The Iranian press release of the phone call between Iranian President Pezeshkian and Pakistani Prime Minister Sharif reports that Pezeshkian informed Sharif that Iran will defend Iran against any renewed U.S. adventurism. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷巴基斯坦总理谢里夫与伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬通电话，讨论了当前地区局势及与美国的谈判。他感谢伊朗在谈判中持续的参与，并感谢其派遣了谈判小组……” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 伊朗媒体关于伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬与巴基斯坦总理谢里夫通话的新闻稿报道称，佩泽希齐扬告知谢里夫，伊朗将捍卫自身，抵御美国任何新的冒险主义行为。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump ‘SCREAMED’ for ‘HOURS’ at aides after Iran shot down US jet — WSJ Kept repeating: ‘Europeans NOT HELPING’ 🚩 @RezistanceTrench 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 《华尔街日报》：在伊朗击落美国喷气式飞机后，特朗普对助手们“尖叫”了“数小时”，并不断重复：“欧洲人根本没帮忙” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Open Source Intel Oh wow. Just heard a massive explosion. My house just shook heavy. No idea what that was tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：噢，天哪。刚听到一声巨大的爆炸。我的房子剧烈震动了一下。完全不知道那是什么。推文

text: Open Source Intel French shipping giant CMA CGM says one of its ships was fired on in the Strait of Hormuz yesterday. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045961513190519248/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：法国航运巨头达飞海运集团（CMA CGM）称，其一艘船只昨日在霍尔木兹海峡遭到射击。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045961513190519248/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Given the scale of equipment and resupply moving into the Middle East theater in the last two weeks, the Islamic regime should take President Trump’s warnings very seriously. If the things go south, there is a plan, not just words. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：鉴于过去两周进入中东战区的装备和补给规模，伊斯兰政权应该非常认真地对待特朗普总统的警告。如果事态恶化，我们有计划，而不仅仅是口头威胁。推文

text: Open Source Intel President Milei appeared on stage during the rehearsal for Israel's Independence Day torch-lighting ceremony. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045959508233482745/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：米莱总统在以色列独立日点火仪式彩排期间出现在舞台上。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045959508233482745/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Trump floated the idea of awarding himself the Medal of Honor, the nation’s highest military decoration for bravery, courage, and sacrifice. (WSJ) tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：特朗普曾流露出想给自己颁发荣誉勋章的想法，这是美国授予勇敢、勇气和牺牲精神的最高军事勋章。（《华尔街日报》）推文

text: Open Source Intel Great map of IDF control in Lebanon New maps of the frontline in Lebanon: - 1st image shows the current line of contact - 2nd image includes the newly declared Yellow Line - 3rd image includes the latest IDF/Hezbollah orders of battle IDF has a significant operational presence in 282km^2. Yellow Line is 534km^2. https://twitter.com/ThetiMapping/status/2045953353092346149/photo/1 - Theti Mapping tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：黎巴嫩以军控制区地图。黎巴嫩前线新地图：- 第一张图显示当前的接触线 - 第二张图包含新宣布的黄线 - 第三张图包含最新的以军/真主党战斗序列。以军在282平方公里的区域内拥有重要的作战存在。黄线区域为534平方公里。https://twitter.com/ThetiMapping/status/2045953353092346149/photo/1 - Theti Mapping 推文
